item.title: A goal to be more active on Github in 2024
item.dc:creator: Peter Hoang
item.description:
I was never active on Github. That may sound strange to many, especially given that I’ve been in software for almost 1.5 decade.

Before, I was busy building software products that I didn’t have the chance to be active on Github.

In 2024, as I’m back to school to strengthen my AI knowledge and skills, I set a goal to be more intentional about sharing what I know. Given my workload, I want to focus on simple, yet helpful, actions that I can maintain to build up my muscle strength.

Some simple actions that I can start doing include:

  • Share useful AI tools and papers.
  • Star the repos I like.
  • Continue to update and add new content to this Github blog.

Hope to see you around at this Github blog and my Github repo.
